w:r.w:t: OFFICE OF THE CLERK OF COURT
In connection with the application for a Regional Trial Court Clearance of
whose signature, right thumb mark, recent picture and Community Certificate Number are shown below, this office certifies to the following:
NO CRIMINAL OR CIVIL CASE FILED OR PENDING
Issued on the basis of the records/dockets obtained in this office since September 16, 1971 up to the present.
Valid for 6 months from the date of issue.
